title: RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH - 211info
text: RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support through home visits, resource navigation, and respite child care for families in immediate need of help. Families involved in outreach also have access to other Relief Nursery services. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Low-income families with children age 6 and younger who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm (541) 343-9706 111 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-9706 ext 111 Leslie Finlay [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Children's In Home Respite Care * At Risk Families Family Support Centers/Outreach * At Risk Families Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ACCESSING SUCCESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
